productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men  Polo Navy Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Blue polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, buttoned chest placket, short sleeves, patch pocket on the left chest, blue piping on the placket, armholes and pocket, branding in flock print on the pocket and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not dry clean,bleach or tumble dry Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Designed for the man of sophistication and crafted from soft cotton with fashionable piping, this polo t-shirt from adidas offers exemplary comfort and is sure to elevate into a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
